---
title: "GeoAI Export"
---

::: {.lead}
The GeoAI Export panel exports a graph for graph-neural-network training and
provides a ready-to-use PyTorch Geometric loader script.
:::

## Graph Export for GNN

| Control | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Format** | **JSON** (node-link format, recommended for PyG) or **GraphML** (standard XML). |
| **Type** | **Homogeneous** (single node/edge type) or **Heterogeneous** (multiple node/edge types). |
| **Export Path** | Destination file path. |
| **Export Graph** | Select the graph object and export it. |

## PyTorch Geometric

| Control | Description |
| --- | --- |
| **Save Loader Script** | Writes an external Python script that reconstructs the exported graph as a PyG `Data`/`HeteroData` structure. |

::: {.callout-tip}
Export as **JSON** + **Heterogeneous** for city2graph multi-type graphs
(buildings, segments, amenities). The saved loader script reads that file back
into PyG without manual wiring.
:::

## Typical workflow

1. Build a graph with any City2Graph panel and select it.
2. Choose the **Format** and **Type**, set an **Export Path**, then
   **Export Graph**.
3. **Save Loader Script** next to the exported file to load it in PyG.
